case_title: YOUNG JIAN LIANG, ET AL VS. CHRISTOPHER GENE AIKEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2017 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF TO MAY-19-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YONG JAIN LIANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER GENE AIKEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF YONG JAIN LIANG IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY BANNIE CHAU, CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER GENE AIKEN IS PRESENT. PRESENT WITH DEFENDANT IS DARRYL ALEXANDER, STATE FARM CLAIM SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIANG, JING LIANG, YONG JIAN AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR TING LIANG AS TO DEFENDANT AIKEN, CHRISTOPHER GENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, JING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER (EX PARTE) GRANTING PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM;[X] THE COURT ORDERS THAT YONG JIAN LIANG IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR JING LIANG.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED MAR-08-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIKEN, CHRISTOPHER GENE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, JING LIANG, YONG JIAN AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR TING LIANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIKEN, CHRISTOPHER GENE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
